cars.name: Used 2017 BMW M4 (Convert Competition)
cars.description:
BMW F82 M4 (Modded to GTS Style)*
Original Color : White
Manufactured Year : 2017
Registered Year : 2022
Japan Spec with 330KMH meter

Performances :
-BM3 Stage 2 : 510whp 740nm (on Wheel Dyno Graph)
-XHP Transmission Stage 3
-Catless Downpipe
-Venox PnP Catback System (Equal Length)
-CTS Ignition Coil
-BMC Air Filter
-Claws Adjustable Suspension
-Front Camber Plate
-TypeOne Stable Bar
-Top Mounted Intercooler Upgraded

Carbon Aero Kit :
-Carbon Mpower Engine Cover
-Carbon R Style Front Lip
-Carbon MAD Front Canard
-Carbon Front Upper & Lower Set
-Carbon PSM Side Lip
-Carbon PSM Diffuser
-Carbon GTS GT Wing

Modifications :
-Ori Competition 666m Rims
-Ori LCI Taillight
-GTS Style Aluminium Hood
-GTS Alcantara Steering
-Yellow DRL Light

*WE Accept Trade-In !!!
*Full Service History!!!
*Like New!!!
*Low Down Payment!!!
*Ready Stock AND LAST UNIT!!!
*One previous owner !!!
*Non-smoker !!!

**360 degree check
**Financing and insurance offer

contact me to get more Details

settings.address: No.16 Jalan MJ 15 Taman Industri Meranti Permai , 47120 Puchong , Selangor

content.heroHeadline:
Every kind of car,
one trusted *showroom*.
content.heroLead: JE Auto deals in Brand New, Used, Recon and Consignment vehicles — with transparent pricing and an instant loan installment estimate on every unit.
content.catNewDesc: Latest models, factory warranty, zero mileage.
content.catUsedDesc: Inspected local units at honest market prices.
content.catReconDesc: Premium imports, low mileage, fully inspected.
content.catConsignDesc: We market and sell your car — you set the terms.
content.calcLead: Adjust the figures or pick 'Calculate Loan' on any car above — the dial updates instantly.
content.calcNote: Estimate only, based on a flat-rate hire purchase calculation. Actual rate and tenure are subject to individual bank approval.
content.consignLead: List your car with JE Auto and let our floor team handle the inspection, marketing and price negotiation — you stay in control of the final price.
content.step1Desc: Bring your car in or send the details over WhatsApp for a no-obligation valuation.
content.step2Desc: Professional photos, pricing strategy and listing across our channels.
content.step3Desc: Our team screens buyers, arranges test drives and negotiates on your behalf.
content.step4Desc: Once sold, funds and paperwork are settled promptly — no commission surprises.
content.consignItem4: Buyer screening & loan pre-approval handled for you
content.why1Desc: Every used and recon unit passes a multi-point mechanical check.
content.why2Desc: Direct access to 9 bank partners for same-day in-principle approval.
content.why3Desc: Trade in your current car and offset it against your next purchase.
content.why4Desc: Selected used and recon units come with a complimentary warranty.
content.ctaHeading: Visit the JE Auto showroom in Puchong
content.ctaText: Walk in for a closer look, a test drive, or to get your loan pre-approved on the spot.
content.footerDesc: Your one-stop showroom in Puchong for Brand New, Used, Recon and Consignment cars — financing handled, no hassle.
